_meta.description: Voice profiles per content mode. EMPTY skeleton — fill with YOUR voice.
_meta.how_to_fill: See templates/voice_profile.template.md. Paste 5-10 of YOUR OWN scripts and let an AI assistant extract tone/persona/hooks/anti-patterns into each mode below.
_meta.note: This file ships EMPTY on purpose — it must contain your voice, not anyone else's.
